zh.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe於1464年出生在英國越可爾索普 賀斯利。她於1478年與Robert Smythe在英國藍卡爾史雲頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國越可爾艾斯加斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe于1464年出生在英国越可爾索普 賀斯利。她于1478年与Robert Smythe在英国藍卡爾史雲頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国越可爾艾斯加斯。

nameMeanings.name: Thorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English thorp(e) ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English thorp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from any of several places called Thorp(e), which are most frequent in Yorkshire, the Midlands, and East Anglia. Compare Throop .

variants.name: Trupp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Hermann, Reinhold.

English (Herefordshire and Monmouthshire): variant of   Thorpe  , or from a place so named, such as Thrupp (Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire), Thrupe (Somerset), Throop (Dorset, Hampshire, Somerset), and Throope (Wiltshire).

variants.name: Throop
meanings: English: from Middle English throp ‘village, hamlet, farmstead’ (Old Norse, Old English throp ‘secondary settlement’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in such a settlement, or habitational, for someone from Throop in Hampshire, Throope in Wiltshire, Thrup in Oxfordshire, or any of the places called Thrupp in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, and Northamptonshire. Compare Thorpe .

variants.name: Tharpe
meanings: English (Kent): variant of   Thorpe  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thorp
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Thorpe  .

variants.name: Troup
meanings: Scottish (eastern): habitational name from a place in the parish of Gamrie, near Banff. The placename is unexplained, perhaps a Pictish cognate of Welsh trwp ‘vessel, dish, basin’.
Possibly also English, a metathesized form of   Thorpe  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe was born in 1464, in Thorpe Hesley, Yorkshire, England. She married Robert Smythe in 1478, in Swinton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in Aysgarth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe est née en 1464, à Thorpe Hesley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Robert Smythe en 1478, à Swinton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Aysgarth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe wurde 1464 in Thorpe Hesley, Yorkshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1478 in Swinton, Lancashire, England Robert Smythe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Aysgarth, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe è nata il nel 1464 nel Thorpe Hesley, Yorkshire, England. Lei sposato Robert Smythe nel 1478, nel Swinton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel Aysgarth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpeは1464年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルペ ヘスリーで生まれた。1478年にイギリスランカシュアイアスウィントンでRobert Smytheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスヨークシュアイアエイスガースで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe(은)는 1464년 영국 요르크실르 소 헤슬리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 랭카실르 스윈턴에서 Robert Smythe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 요르크실르 아이스가스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe nasceu em 1464, em Thorpe Hesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Robert Smythe em 1478, em Swinton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Aysgarth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe родилась в 1464 г. в местности таурп хесли, еркшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Smythe в 1478 г. в местности свинтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности аисгарт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Catherine Thorpe nació en 1464, en Thorpe Hesley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Robert Smythe en 1478, en Swinton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en Aysgarth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
